title: Avatar · New component
content:
Avatar is a new component in Green Design System. An avatar represents a user, entity, or object. It is typically displayed as an image, initials, or icon, and helps identify ownership, participation, or presence in the interface. It shows the image if one is provided, falls back to initials or short text if not, and uses a default profile icon as a last resort. No extra setup needed.

## Shapes

Avatar comes in two shapes: **circular** - used in more prominent or personal contexts, such as the top header or profile-related areas.for people, and **square** - used to represent products, accounts, or organizations. This includes cases like specific account types, funds, or company logos.

## Sizes

Four sizes are available - **xs**, **s**, **m**, and **l**, so an avatar fits whether you need it in a tight list or as a prominent profile display.

## Badge support

Need to show a notification count or a status indicator on top of an avatar? Drop a badge into the badge slot and it appears in the top-right corner automatically.

## Grouping

Avatars can be grouped together. The overlapping ring cutout effect is handled by the component, just stack them and it works. For overflow cases like a long member list, add an extra avatar with text like “+5” and the visual treatment stays consistent.

---

Avatar is available in Figma and documented at [seb.io/component/avatar](https://seb.io/component/avatar).
